right-populist-escalation.label_en: From protest to blockade: right-populist escalation 2018–2022
right-populist-escalation.label_fr: De la protestation au blocus : l’escalade populiste de droite 2018–2022
right-populist-escalation.causal_note: Yellow vest organizing in Canada (2018) seeded the networks and rhetoric that re-emerged in the 2022 convoy and Coutts blockade. Documented overlap in organizers, funding sources, and messaging. Diagolon emerged from this milieu as an explicitly accelerationist network.

science-suppression-federal.label_en: The muzzling years: federal science suppression 2006–2015
science-suppression-federal.label_fr: Les années de bâillon : suppression de la science fédérale 2006–2015
science-suppression-federal.causal_note: A documented pattern of Harper government actions restricting federal scientists from communicating findings publicly, closing research facilities, and defunding independent science. Pattern established across multiple independent sources including Auditor General, CBC, Globe, and peer-reviewed commentary.

alberta-municipal-override.label_en: Province over city: UCP intervention in municipal decisions
alberta-municipal-override.label_fr: La province contre la ville : intervention de l’UCP dans les décisions municipales
alberta-municipal-override.causal_note: A pattern of UCP government actions that override, defund, or legislatively constrain municipal decisions — particularly in Calgary and Edmonton. Includes Green Line withdrawal, bike lane legislation, and other interventions.

smith-federal-confrontation.label_en: Collision course: Smith vs federal government 2022–2026
smith-federal-confrontation.label_fr: Trajectoire de collision : Smith contre le gouvernement fédéral 2022–2026
smith-federal-confrontation.causal_note: Smith government actions framed as provincial autonomy vs federal overreach: Sovereignty Act, proposed pension withdrawal, cross-border policy alignment statements, separatism referendum push.

alberta-voter-privacy.label_en: The voter-data breaches: privacy of Alberta citizens 2026
alberta-voter-privacy.label_fr: Les atteintes aux données électorales : la vie privée des citoyens albertains 2026
alberta-voter-privacy.causal_note: A pattern of mishandling of Albertans’ confidential voter data in 2026. A sitting minister accessed the List of Electors for an unauthorized purpose; separately, a separatist third-party group published a searchable database of approximately 2.9 million voters’ personal information.

ata-teachers-strike-2025.label_en: ATA strike 2025: teachers, Bill 15, and the UCP
ata-teachers-strike-2025.label_fr: Grève de l’ATA 2025 : les enseignants, le projet de loi 15 et l’UCP
ata-teachers-strike-2025.causal_note: A series of UCP government actions relating to the Alberta Teachers’ Association labour dispute and related legislation. Thread to be expanded as events are sourced and verified.

notwithstanding-clause-use.label_en: Section 33 and the pre-emptive shield: UCP use of the notwithstanding clause
notwithstanding-clause-use.label_fr: L’article 33 et le bouclier préventif : recours de l’UCP à la clause dérogatoire
notwithstanding-clause-use.causal_note: UCP government use and threatened use of s.33 of the Charter of Rights and Freedoms as a pre-emptive legislative tool. Thread to be expanded as events are sourced and verified.
